problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
mechanism: Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics
hypothesis: If Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics is applied to alphafold, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
